title: Thane Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 54 Medical Specialist Posts
description: The Thane Municipal Corporation has declared the official notification for the recruitment of 51 Medical Specialist Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, MD/ MS, DNB, BAMS, BHMS, MDS, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the Thane Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Job...
